lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Why were the Israelites conquered by Midian?
answers: They disobeyed God and worshiped false gods
They were too few in number
Midian's gods were more powerful than the Lord

questions.text: What judge did God send to rescue Israel from the Midianites?
Why didn’t Gideon think he could rescue Israel?
answers: He felt unimportant, and his family was weak
He didn’t know how to fight
He didn't know how to lead an army

questions.text: What two things did Gideon destroy at night?
answers: The altar of Baal and the pole of Asherah
The Tower of Babel and the Ark of the Covenant

questions.text: What miracles did Gideon ask God to do with the fleece?
answers: Make the wool wet and the ground dry, then the opposite

questions.text: Why did God say Gideon had too many soldiers?
answers: So Israel would know God won the battle, not their own strength
Gideon didn't know how to lead an army

questions.text: How did God shrink Gideon’s army down to 300 men?
answers: He sent fearful men home and chose men based on how they drank water
He chose only the strongest warriors
He selected a few men from each tribe of Israel

questions.text: What was the Israelites’ battle plan?
answers: Split into groups, surround the enemy, break jars, and hold up torches
March around the Midianites for seven days like they did in Jericho
Pray for God to send fire from heaven

questions.text: What did God cause the Midianite soldiers to do?
